name: KeepUp Survival
short_description: KeepUp Survival is an open base-building and exploration game set in a natural, abandoned world. Build, gather, survive, and unfold your own story on a mysterious island.
detailed_description:
KeepUp Survival is a creative base-building and exploration survival game in a natural world.

The focus is on building, crafting, discovery and relaxed survival at your own pace. PvP is possible, but optional and not the main focus.

Shape your own survival: There are no fixed quests, you set your own goals, explore the island, build your base and freely develop your playstyle.

An island with secrets

A worldwide pandemic has shaken humanity. On this remote island, there was once a secret research facility meant to develop a cure, but something went wrong.

During the global chaos, an evacuation flight was launched, but navigation data was unreliable, communication systems failed and fuel was running low.
The plane lost control and crashed near an unknown island, by accident… or maybe not?

You survive the crash and find yourself alone in a seemingly peaceful but abandoned world.

As you explore the island, you discover voice messages from a woman named Jill, who was here before you. She reports strange events, experiments in the research facility and something hidden deep beneath the surface.

Inside the facility, you come across traces of these experiments… remnants of something human, that is no longer entirely human.
The research created something that should never have existed.

Jill’s last message ends with a warning:

“I can’t receive any signals worldwide anymore – except for one last weak transmission from New York. Stay on the island… this could be the last safe place.”

The island tells only part of the truth.

The deeper you go, the greater the mystery of the world becomes.

Building & Designing

  • Build bases from wood, stone, glass, straw and much more

  • Build workbenches, furniture and functional structures

  • Create your own settlements and creative projects

Crafting & Progression

  • Craft tools, weapons and equipment

  • Process materials, smelt metals and expand your infrastructure

  • Generate electricity with solar and wind power

Nature & Self-Sufficiency

  • Grow your own garden (e.g. vegetables, potatoes, plants)

  • Process resources through cooking and smelting

  • Tame dogs as loyal hunting companions

Exploration & Atmosphere

  • Open world with abandoned buildings and secret locations

  • Vehicles, horses and boats for transportation

  • Dynamic weather & day-night cycle

  • Discover clues to the true story of the island

Survival Elements

  • Hunger, thirst and exhaustion

  • Hunting and defense against wild animals

  • No zombies or monsters in the main game

  • PvP possible, but voluntary and not the focus

Multiplayer & Customization

  • Play alone or in co-op with friends (P2P)

  • Optional PvP

Optional DLC: For players seeking more challenge

The main game offers a realistic, nature-based survival experience without zombies or monsters.

For players who want to experience an alternative, more dangerous version of the world, there is a free, optional DLC.

This alternative game mode poses the question:

What would have happened if the experiments at the research facility had never been stopped?

Mutated creatures, increased danger and new survival strategies await you, completely optional and separate from the main focus.

Conclusion

KeepUp Survival offers you an open world without a fixed ending; you decide how you survive, build, explore and uncover the island’s secrets.
Every decision shapes your own story.
Whether you want to build creatively, live peacefully or explore the island’s lore, you decide where your journey leads.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Polish, Italian, Spanish - Spain, French, Portuguese - Portugal, Swedish, Turkish, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Simplified Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
